title: Introducing the new Workspaces navigation dropdown

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!
We are super-excited to share with you our new Workspaces navigation experience!
You can now navigate easily between Workspaces via the NEW Workspace Navigation Dropdown , where you can find all the Workspaces that you recently visited as well as search for any Workspace available in the account!
Just click on the Workspace Name at the top > See the new dropdown menu? This is it! Now go ahead and navigate to a Workspace!
To enable it in your account, go to monday.labs and activate “Workspace Dropdown Navigation”!
Enjoy!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Here’s a video clip showing the difference and how to enable/disable it - New Workspace dropdown navi...

posts.author: DTCSC (Danie Tucker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it be possible to either favorite workspaces and/or pin workspaces in addition to having “recent workspaces”?

Thank you for the update and for addressing the icon workspace navigation.

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @DTCSC we will consider it!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ayelet

This is such a great improvement, job well done. One thing that might even further enhance it. When you switch workspace the open board remains open (which probably live in the workspace I just left). Is it possible to open the first board in the workspace visited whenever I open that workspace by the dropdown? Or even better: give us the ability to define which board is the “default” board to open when entering a workspace.

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the suggestion @basdebruin, we will consider it

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
basdebruin:

give us the ability to define which board is the “default” board to open when entering a workspace.

Love this idea. Would be super handy.

posts.author: DTCSC (Danie Tucker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Really like this idea as well!

@Ayelet thank you for looking into both!

posts.author: Jody (Jody Poland)
posts.cookedHtml: Can’t we just have the original, full workspace listing back? This is way too many clicks to get to where you want to go. This is not an improvement. It is unfortunately another failed design attempt. You tried something and it failed. Own it and make it right.

posts.author: editarr (Ed.Arr)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am sadly not a fan of this either.
It requieres way more clicks than before to navigate inbetween workspaces. On top of that, not all workspaces are shown at first, so in order to get to some bords I will also need to type the name (or click a few more times to get to all boards). I will also always need to read the names of the bords in order to figure out which one to click, since their position changes each time.
I know these are small complaints and the new design only takes a bit more time, but it is a frustration and an unnecessary one at that.
Keeping both options (as it is now) would be perfectly fine but please don’t get rid of the current version. Even keeping the old one where all workspaces and bords were in one tab was so much easier to navigate.

posts.author: Jody (Jody Poland)
posts.cookedHtml: @Ayelet? Where do we stand with this debacle?

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Jody - appreciate the feedback - at this time we have no intention of reverting back to the previous version of the workspace list.

We are looking to create other features/functions that will tackle the need to get to the right information easily like the new Homepage:

https://community.monday.com/t/new-monday-com-homepage/17343

posts.author: Jack (Jack Stirk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Rather than showing recent boards below the search bar it needs to just show a list of all your pinned workspaces in alphabetical order. Would be so much more useful. I say pinned because users need the ability to hide workspaces they don’t use often. If they want them they can search for them or pin them.

Currently we have to click ‘browse all’ each time as we can’t remember the names, and because that shows users all workspaces including the ones they’re not in, they keep joining them which I can’t prevent because we’re not on enterprise. Not great.

Just simplify it, click workspaces icon> see a full list of my pinned workspaces (Icons were too small so I’d probably just stick to titles)

Remove the clutter ‘recent’, ‘favourites’, ‘add workspace’, ‘browse all’ could all go they’re not useful. Would be cleaner and easier to use IMO.

posts.author: DTCSC (Danie Tucker)
posts.cookedHtml: @Jack This would be an excellent solution to the workspace issue. Pinning would definitely help fix this.

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ayelet:

ate easily between Workspaces via the NEW Workspace Navigation Dropdown , where you can find all the Workspaces that you recently visited as well as searc

I agree, the current version is fine as-is. Please don’t eliminate it.

posts.author: DTCSC (Danie Tucker)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you!! Just saw the update of “My Workplaces” rather than recent. Finding it much much better!!

posts.author: nicb (Nicole)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ayelet:

monday.labs

This is a brilliant feature! So much easier to navigate, especially for less experienced users.

posts.author: Cristine (Cristine Hall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agree 100 percent. It would be nice to have a way to view all the workspaces at once. Sad face.

Edit: Wait! MondayLabs is awesome and allows you to view the old nav bar! I hope it doesn’t go away.

posts.author: simon_blinno (Simon Blickenstorfer)
posts.cookedHtml: No…

posts.author: Vestec (Stian Osmundsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Another step back for monday.com.
We do not need a homepage. We need quick access to the different boards. The icon view was superb. Please bring it back.

posts.author: Lorne (Lorne Beckman)
posts.cookedHtml: Indeed the new view is the worst. I hate it! Ridiculous. Every time I go into the drop-down menu, I get angry. Once a month I check one board and then it shows up at the top of recent items from then on. Geez. So stupid. Bring back the ICON view please!

posts.author: KieranBiscoe (Kieran)
posts.cookedHtml: How come the Icon view has disappeared from Monday.labs? I found the icons a lot easier to use as all my workspaces were all accessible at the same time as opposed to having to go into the drop down and select it, also when I use the dropdown it takes me to the workspace homepage and normally I’m going into a different workspace to cross reference information and I’d use the open in a new tab feature and it would just open a new tab with the desired board. Now it takes me into the workspace home page so now I have to open a blank tab and just open a new instance of Monday.com…

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml: This is not a good update–at all! I’d like to see this feature reactivated.

posts.author: rosovconsulting (Rosov Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: As a compromise, maybe instead of having a separate Favorites “workspace” your favorited boards could just appear in the drop-down menu? And/or the drop-down menu should let you search for Boards, not just workspaces.

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml: And, to take it a step further, they could add the Favorites icon below the My Work icon. What’s the purpose of having Favorites for easy access, if we can’t easily access it? #FixItMonday

posts.author: Rhyno3000 (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All

Totally agree - removing the icons only slows down access and productivity time.
Why would you remove something that causes no issues what so ever.

Always one step forward three steps back with Monday it seems.

Regards

posts.author: Kelly2E (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml: Same! Would really like to have the icons back! @Ayelet

posts.author: janelegall (Jane)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I change the workspaces that are displayed in the dropdown workspace menu? Some of the ones that are in the list are not the ones I use regularly and I want to customise the workspaces displayed so that I don’t have to search for it.

posts.author: chrisflavours (Chris Watts)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to have the Workspace navigation bar back as well!!

posts.author: Brante (Marcelo Brante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, for some user the new is great, but not for me.

All peoples of my company that user Monday says the same, we need the older version

posts.author: kgydigital (KGY)
posts.cookedHtml: Bring back the icons please

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @bradley! Any update on this? Has this been considered? It seems like an easy fix just to move the favorites icon either above ‘Workspaces’ or below ‘My Work’.

posts.author: MelissaH (Melissa Hallbauer)
posts.cookedHtml: I also miss the old workspace navigation. I’ve got most of my org’s users retrained to use the lightning bolt to get around, but my god, the dropdown is so inefficient.
